executionHistory.expansionReason: Parent-expanded full-delivery run driven by bubbles.goal (no nested runSubagent runtime; full-delivery is not requiresTopLevelRuntime, so parent-expansion is permitted). The analyst phase authored the BDD spec.md and seeded state.json. Operator directive (verbatim): 'weather command should return all info, not just temperature - humidity, rains, sun, uv, wind, etc., also 10 days forecast'.
executionHistory.note: Created specs/094-weather-rich-forecast/ with a complete BDD spec.md that ENRICHES the spec-061 SCOPE-07 weather_lookup skill so the conversational `weather` command returns the FULL set of current conditions (condition, temp, feels-like, humidity, precipitation, wind speed+direction, UV, sunrise/sunset) PLUS a config-driven N-day (default 10) daily forecast, instead of today's single terse line 'Barcelona, ES: clear, 18.0C'. GROUNDED against real source: tool.go (Forecast{ForecastLine,ProviderName,RetrievedAt}, ForecastWindow now/today/tomorrow/weekend, outputSchema additionalProperties:false, direct_output_from_tool emits the tool JSON verbatim), open_meteo.go (geocode + forecast current=temperature_2m,weather_code only; today/tomorrow/weekend fall back to current via `_ = window`; weatherCodeToSummary WMO map), facade_assembler.go (Body=forecast_line + ExternalProviderRef, refuse-to-assemble anti-fabrication on missing forecast_line/provider_name/retrieved_at => requires_provenance BS-006 capture), cache.go (LRU keyed by provider|location|window, preserves RetrievedAt per §5.2), weather-query-v1.yaml (output_schema {forecast_line,provider_name,retrieved_at,slot_missing}, direct_output_from_tool), config/smackerel.yaml assistant.skills.weather (enabled/provider/api_key_ref/cache_ttl/geocode_url/forecast_url), executor.go (BS-005 tool return-schema validation + direct-output scenario output_schema validation), render_outbound.go (Body is plain text; escapeForMode applies MarkdownV2 escaping; budgetTruncate honors max_message_chars). Distinguished assistant.skills.weather.* (this spec) from the SEPARATE connectors.weather.* spec-016 ingestion connector (NOT touched). spec.md: Problem (operator quote + the temp-only gap), Goals (rich current + N-day forecast + one-answer-every-surface + provider-neutral + provenance + SST units + zero regression), Non-Goals (no new provider, no connector change, no alerts, no hourly, no per-user units), Domain Capability Model (enriched Forecast primitive + CurrentConditions + DailyForecast sub-primitives), Product Principle Alignment (P2/P6/P7/P8 binding), Release Train (mvp, no new flag), Requirements R1-R12, Acceptance Criteria AC-1..AC-11, 14 Gherkin scenarios SCN-094-A01..A14, and 5 open decisions for design.

executionHistory.expansionReason: Parent-expanded full-delivery run driven by bubbles.goal; the UX phase authored the binding `## UX` section inside design.md (ux.md is a forbidden sidecar) — the rendered weather message layout, the condition language, and the two exception flows. UX is mandatory even though weather is non-UI-heavy: it owns the rendered text shape across Telegram/HTTP/web/mobile and the status/exception language.
executionHistory.note: Authored design.md `## UX` (binding). Settled rendered-layout decision (e): a 3-line current block (line1 `

executionHistory.expansionReason: Parent-expanded full-delivery run driven by bubbles.goal; the design phase authored design.md (technical design) and settled the five open decisions plus the dual output-schema strategy. Did NOT write scopes.md, implement code, or change status. Next required owner: bubbles.plan.
executionHistory.note: Authored design.md GROUNDED against real source (executor.go §3e BS-005 tool return-schema validation [outSch.ValidateBytes terminal] AND the direct_output_from_tool path validating the tool JSON against sc.outputSchema [scenario YAML]; tool.go outputSchema additionalProperties:false + marshalForecast; open_meteo.go forecast() current-only + weatherCodeToSummary + geocode comma-retry; facade_assembler.go refuse-to-assemble; cache.go §5.2; assistant.go loader mustString/mustInt/mustDuration + permissiveString for api_key_ref; config.sh ASSISTANT_SKILLS_WEATHER_* read/test-override/emit triplet; wiring_assistant_skills.go NewOpenMeteoProvider+NewCache+SetServices; render_outbound.go escapeForMode+budgetTruncate; stub-providers/fixtures/forecast.json hermetic fixture). SETTLED: (a) output shape = rendered multi-line forecast_line (binding user answer) PLUS additive structured current/daily/units on the tool JSON (for spec-073 frontend); (b) 10-day via a new REQUIRED SST forecast_days knob (1-16) — ForecastWindow enum unchanged and still accepted; (c) current UV = today's daily uv_index_max (open-meteo current has no uv_index); (d) three REQUIRED unit keys temperature_unit{celsius,fahrenheit}/wind_speed_unit{kmh,ms,mph,kn}/precipitation_unit{mm,inch} with closed vocabularies, fail-loud, mapped to open-meteo params + display symbols; (e) UX layout (above). Dual-schema strategy: tool outputSchema widened strict (required:[...6...]+additionalProperties:false); weather-query-v1.yaml output_schema widened additive (current/daily/units optional, required unchanged, slot_missing preserved) so the slot_missing final and the rich tool final both validate. open-meteo one-call request (current 7 vars + daily 7 vars + forecast_days + 3 unit params + timezone=auto); new pure helpers degreesToCompass/dayLabel/renderForecastLine; provider-neutral Forecast gains *CurrentConditions/[]DailyForecast/*ForecastUnits. File-touch map (16 rows across 3 scopes). No change to executor/Provider-interface/Cache/router/connectors.weather.

executionHistory.expansionReason: Parent-expanded full-delivery run driven by bubbles.goal; the plan phase authored scopes.md (3 scopes, single-file), the report.md evidence skeleton, uservalidation.md ([x] baseline), and scenario-manifest.json (14 scenarios), and updated state.json. executionHistory.note: Authored scopes.md as a 3-scope single-file DAG (01 -> {02, 03}). SCOPE-01 = the coherent contract change (CurrentConditions/DailyForecast/ForecastUnits types, widened Forecast+marshalForecast+tool outputSchema strict, open_meteo rich one-call fetch+renderForecastLine/degreesToCompass/dayLabel, facade weatherFinalPayload widening, weather-query-v1.yaml output_schema additive) — compile-green using OpenMeteoOptions literals in tests. SCOPE-02 = SST plumbing (4 REQUIRED keys forecast_days+3 units through smackerel.yaml -> config.sh -> assistant.go loaders+closed-vocab/range validation -> cmd/core wiring threads into the provider constructor), fail-loud, no fallback default. SCOPE-03 = consolidated verification (expand stub forecast.json, BS-003 e2e assertion, fakeWeatherProvider p95 parity, cache/window/exception regression, docs/smackerel.md row). Each scope: Status=Not Started, Depends On DAG, Test Plan with one row per test-related DoD item, a checkbox DoD (all unchecked), and SCN linkage. 14 scenarios SCN-094-A01..A14 mapped 1:1 to linkedTests across the weather package + config + stress + e2e. No new feature flag (flagsIntroduced:[]); releaseTrain mvp.
